Terms

Terms of Service

Last updated: May 8, 2026

Use of the App

Neon Ninja Run is provided for personal entertainment. Do not misuse the app, interfere with services, or attempt to bypass purchase, ad, or reward systems.

Purchases

In-app purchases are handled by Apple. Refunds and billing issues are managed through Apple according to App Store policies.

Game Progress

Progress, rewards, cosmetics, and event content may change as the game is updated or balanced.

Availability

Some features, including ads, Game Center, analytics, and online events, may require network access or third-party services.

Contact

Questions can be sent to support@neonninjarun.com.

Neon Ninja Run

Fast action arcade running in neon worlds.
